podcasts.title: House of the Spirits
podcasts.description: The House of the Spirits" is Isabel Allende's debut novel, first published in 1982. It's a multi-generational family saga that blends magical realism with political history, following the Trueba family through decades of love, power, and political upheaval in an unnamed Latin American country (heavily based on Chile).
podcasts.author: Isabel Allende
